author: BulletTing
selftext:
JUMP AI Trading app. If you have USDT sitting in an exchange, transfer it over to JUMP to earn some extra income. Invitation link below. Returns on investment in 5 weeks. This is the new COS, 200 usdt to start with to show earnings.
https://jumptdd.com/#/register?code=NGHA90
Once registered you will be invited to a WhatsApp group to help you grow and earn more.
